description_long: This is a medium-sized yacht with a streamlined monohull design, featuring a pointed bow and a flat stern. The hull is painted in a combination of brown and blue, with a white superstructure at the stern that includes a raised deck area and visible railings. The yacht is equipped with a tall central mast and a smaller mast at the rear, suggesting it is a sailing vessel. Portholes line the hull, and the deck appears to have a walkable surface with a partially enclosed cockpit area at the stern. The overall structure is sleek, with minimal external equipment visible aside from the masts and railings. The yacht's design is functional for both leisure and navigation, with ample space for movement on the deck.
description: A sleek, medium-sized sailing yacht with a brown and blue hull, white superstructure, and tall central mast. Features include a walkable deck, stern cockpit, and visible railings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the yacht, the tall central mast, brown and blue hull, and the white superstructure at the stern.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat stern, white superstructure, railings, and the smaller rear mast.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the hull's color scheme and the central mast.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the pointed bow, hull curvature, and the central mast rising from the deck.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a pointed bow and flat stern, featuring a brown and blue color scheme, portholes along the hull, and a smooth, streamlined profile.
attribute_deck_layout: Single-level deck with a raised white superstructure at the stern, walkable surfaces, visible railings, and a partially enclosed cockpit area. Central and rear masts are present, with minimal deck equipment visible.
attribute_cabin_structure: One main cabin structure at the stern, rectangular in shape with a flat roof, surrounded by railings and featuring several windows. No additional cabins are visible.
